title: Snakes & Ladders and Ludo Giant Board Game Set Classic Entertainment Fun for the Whole Family, Waterproof Game Play sheet, Activities, Suitable for Indoor or Outdoor Play
features: ♟️🐍🪜🎲 TAKE A BREAK: Ditch the television, telephone, and computer; both parents and children will undoubtedly enjoy this board game together, enhancing parent-child interaction and reigniting family night. Includes five colourful game pieces and small dice

♟️🐍🪜🎲 LEARN & PLAY: A traditional board game for the whole family that everyone remembers. Perfect for 2 to 4 players and guaranteed to give the family endless hours of fun. A fantastic learning and educational toy that promotes creativity and logic, fundamental physics, fine motor skills, colour identification, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving abilities while providing captivating continuous motion for hours of dynamic gameplay

♟️🐍🪜🎲 CHILD-FRIENDLY: All the set pieces are child-friendly, so let your children play freely and organise their own game. This set is also very easy to store, so it can be taken on vacation and used as a travel board game set, or you can play it indoor or outdoor and delight your family for hours
♟️🐍🪜🎲 IDEAL GIFT: Surprise your children with this fun giant board game providing countless hours of fun and unique memories! Best gift for Boys and Girls: Suitable for 3 and up
description: Product description TAKE A BREAK: Ditch the television, telephone, and computer; both parents and children will undoubtedly enjoy this board game together, enhancing parent-child interaction and reigniting family night. Includes five colourful game pieces and small dice. Directions 1. Remove the game from its packaging. 2. Place the game sheet on a flat surface. 3. Each player chooses a coloured game piece and places it on the starting square. 4. The youngest player goes first and rolls the dice. 5. Move your game piece according to the number rolled on the dice. 6. If you land on a snake, slide down to the bottom of the snake. If you land on a ladder, climb up to the top of the ladder. 7. The first player to reach the end of the game sheet wins. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts See more
